---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error, typo, or inaccuracy in a skill or reference
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what is wrong (e.g. incorrect step, broken link, typo, wrong severity guidance).

## Location

- **Plugin:** (e.g. `plugins/reentrancy-pattern-analysis/`)
- **File:** (e.g. `skills/reentrancy-pattern-analysis/SKILL.md` or `references/reentrancy-variants.md`)

## Current vs expected

- **Current:** What the content says or does now.
- **Expected:** What it should say or do (and optionally a short rationale or source).

## Additional context

Any references (EIPs, OWASP, audit reports) or screenshots that support the fix.
